steps.t: Leigh Putnam is just inside the entrance of the cave. You have travelled with Leigh to the cave where refugees are seeking shelter from Orc-attacks.
The refugees are hiding in the back of the cave. Leigh Putnam has asked you to try and lift the spirits of the refugees hiding in the cave and to conv…
Severin Wheeler has arrived in the cave with grim tidings. You have tried to convince the refugees to come to the relative safety of Trestlebridge, bu…
Leigh Putnam is inside the refugee cave. You have aided in the defence of the refugees, and now Leigh wishes to speak with you.
